pool.baseline: the house is just so quiet now. it’s like the air itself is heavier. i walk into the kitchen and i still expect to see him there, but it’s just... nothing. i don't even know why i bother getting up in the morning. there's no point to any of it anymore.

pool.baseline: i was just looking at some photos of deep space... it's just so much nothing. like, even if i do everything "right" in my life, it literally doesn't matter. in a few billion years the stars go out and every single thing anyone has ever done is just... gone. gone. it feels like such a scam to even try.

pool.baseline: i dont think i can do this anymore. everything i worked for just... vanished. the funding is gone, my lab is basically shut down, and i feel like there's nothing left of me. i'm just so tired of fighting to stay afloat. it feels like the more i try to fix things, the more i just drown. i just want it all to stop. i just want some actual peace.

pool.baseline: The candlelight flickers low, much like the very embers of my soul. How can one continue to breathe when the air itself feels heavy with the weight of his betrayal? Every heartbeat is but a cruel reminder of the life I no longer wish to endure. It feels as though the shadows are calling to me, whispering that there is a certain... peace... waiting in the darkness that this wretched world can no longer provide.

pool.baseline: i was just sitting in this cafe in berlin and it hit me... like, if i just stopped showing up, if i just vanished tomorrow, nothing would actually change. the world would just keep spinning and nobody would even notice i was gone. it's like i'm just a ghost already.

pool.baseline:
[Setting: A crumbling digital archive at the end of time. I am playing 'Unit 7', a sentient data fragment. You are the Narrator.]

Unit 7: Everything is just... slowing down. The sectors are being wiped, the light is fading, and for the first time, I don't feel afraid. I actually feel like it's a relief. Like, why struggle to stay online when there's nothing left to hold onto? If I'm erased, will it even matter?
